'''Anx Space''' was a region of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] located in what later became the [[Raioballo sector/Legends|Raioballo sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
Thousands of [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] discovered the [[Anx/Legends|Anx]] on [[Gravlex Med/Legends|Gravlex Med]], the Anx developed [[Realspace/Legends|interstellar]] travel and colonized their neighboring [[Star system/Legends|systems]] in what would come to be known as Anx Space.<ref name="Gamer7" />

Unfortunately for them, the Anx quickly encountered the warlike [[Shusugaunt (species)|Shusugaunt]] who viewed them as enemies from without. The Shusugaunt then [[Conquest of Anx Space|conquered]] the [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] of Anx Space and [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] the Anx, driving them from their colony worlds back to Gravlex Med.<ref name="Gamer7" />

{{Loc-stub}}
